creative_brief: Warm, welcoming shot of diverse families at farmers market or farm gate, with produce boxes in background showing the community aspect.
primary_text:
You know that feeling when you pick up a pack of chicken and have no idea where it came from? You are not the only one.

Sydney families are choosing something different. Buying direct from farms they can name. Rachel's Farm in Kempsey. Bundarra Farm. Farmer Brown. Real food from regenerative land in NSW.

FarmThru makes it simple. Collect from the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday. No middlemen. No commitment. Just food you do not have to second-guess.
headline: You are not the only one asking
description: Sydney families buying direct from named NSW farms. Zero middlemen. No commitment. Collect from Brookvale.
